notes:
The following was true on two laptops with nvidia:

Flathub steam version ran moonring fine.

But the native Steam of my distro, which runs almost every other game fine, can't run Moonring.

It shows the word "Launching" next to the game name when I try to launch it, then briefly shows "Running" for half a second, and then the game is not running anymore. The game does not appear at all on the screen.
